CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column  describes 
the changes that have been introduced in the document.

ACRONYM TABLE  
Acronym Description 
ARC ARCtic Ocean 
ASC Ascending orbit 
ATL ATLantic Ocean (North-East part) 
BAL BALtic Sea 
BLK BLacK Sea 
CLS Collecte Localisation Satellite 
CP Cross-Polarisation 
CYMS CYclone Monitoring Seervice 
DH Dual-Horizontal acquisition mode, with both HH and HV channels 
DSC Descending orbit 
DV Dual-Vertical acquisition mode, with both VV and VH channels

EIS Entry Into Service 
ESA European Spatial Agency 
EW Extended Wide 
GMF Geophysical Model Function

HR High-Resolution 
HV channel Channel emitting in Horizontal Polarization and receiving in Vertical polarization

IFS Integrated Forecasting System (from ECMWF) 
IPF Instrument Processing Facility

27 March 2026 
1.3 
 
                                                      Page 4/ 45 
Acronym Description 
S1C Sentinel-1C 
SAR Synthetic Aperture Radar 
SFMR Stepped Frequency Microwave Radiometer 
SI Scatter index 
SMAP Soil Moisture Active and Passive mission 
SMOS Soil Moisture and Ocean Salinity 
SNR Signal-Noise Ratio 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
VH channel Channel emitting in Vertical Polarization and receiving in Horizontal polarization 
VV channel Channel emitting in Vertical Polarization and receiving in Vertical polarization 
 
 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
 
co-pol channel Channel where both the emitting and receiving polarization of the signal 
are the same : either both Vertical (VV channel), or both Horizontal (HH 
channel) 
cross-pol channel Acquisition channel where the receiving polarization is orthogonal to the 
emitting one ; either emitting in Ve rtical polarization and receiving in 
Horizontal polarization (VH channel) or emitting in Horizontal 
polarization and receiving in Vertical polarization. 
Dual-Vertical Acquisition mode where both co -pol channel VV and cross -pol channel 
VH are received 
Dual-Horizontal Acquisition mode where both co -pol channel HH and cross -pol channel 
HV are received 
co-pol inversion Wind retrieval algorithm performed on the co-pol channel only 
dual-pol inversion Wind retrieval algorithm performed on both  the co -pol and cross -pol 
channels (when available)

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for high-resolution wind products from the WIND Thematic Assembly Centre, detailing product specifications and updates.

variables.long_name: Wind speed at 10m above sea level
Wind direction from which the wind is blowing towards 10m above sea level
